sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94212" key="sinapiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐνᾱπ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n94212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must put on a mustard-blister</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:3:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:13:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.13.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
